examples: This chapter analysis several theories about doctrine of the equitable subornation, trying to conduct a comprehensive definition to the doctrine;
Perjury, subornation of perjury, concealment of subpoenaed documents, and witness tampering are all forms of obstruction of justice.
We make perjury, subornation of perjury, obstruction of justice and witness tampering crimes because a judicial system can only succeed if its procedures expose the truth.
